text.title: Asymmetric Churn Power Interview Protocol Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed across deployments. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Themes mix trial dropouts with paid churners; conclusions garbled.
antipattern.fix: Define churn cohort first (segment + window + min usage threshold).

antipattern.symptom: Synthesis describes failure modes but offers no positive counterfactual.
Transcripts read like marketing copy: 'would you pay $99 for X?'
antipattern.fix: Rewrite to open-ended; ban 'would you' phrasings.

antipattern.symptom: Coding reflects the coder's hypothesis; replication kappa = 0.3.
antipattern.fix: Require ≥2 independent coders; report Cohen's kappa ≥0.7.
